title: Rich Braised Dutch Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Dutch stew made with braised beef, unwaxed lime, and root vegetables, perfect for a cold winter's night, this dish is also relatively low in calories.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef pieces with salt and pepper.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat and brown the beef on all sides.
Remove the browned beef from the pot and set it aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened.
Add the chopped carrots, potatoes, and celery to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, and bay leaves to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the browned beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the lime juice.
